response: TEMPERATURE IS A MEASURE OF THE HEAT ENERGY IN A SUBSTANCE. IT IS A PHYSICAL PROPERTY THAT IS INDEPENDENT OF THE SIZE OF THE SAMPLE. THE TEMPERATURE OF A SAMPLE CAN BE MEASURED USING A TEMPERATURE SENSOR OR A THERMOMETER. THE TEMPERATURE OF A ROOM IS AFFECTED BY THE ROLL OF THE WIND AND THE LOCATION OF THE ROOM. THE TEMPERATURE OF A ROOM CAN BE INCREASED BY USING A HEATER OR A ROLLER. THE TEMPERATURE OF A ROOM CAN BE DECREASED BY USING A COOLER OR A ROLLER. THE TEMPERATURE OF A ROOM CAN BE MONITORED USING A TEMPERATURE SENSOR OR A THERMOMETER. THE TEMPERATURE OF A ROOM CAN BE CHANGED BY USING A HEATER OR A ROLLER. THE TEMPERATURE OF A ROOM CAN BE CHANGED BY USING A COOLER OR A ROLLER. THE TEMPERATURE OF A ROOM CAN BE MONITORED USING A TEMPERATURE SENSOR OR A THERMOMETER. THE TEMPERATURE OF A ROOM CAN BE CHANGED BY USING A HEATER OR A ROLLER.
